meta.title: Max & Victoria
meta.description: We're getting married! Join us on September 13, 2026.

hero.subtitle: We're Getting Married!
hero.venueAddress:
R. Fonte da Vinha 383
4430-487 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
hero.hopeMakeIt: We hope you can make it!

ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.quoteHim: I saw her across the room and I couldn't look away.
ourStory.quoteHer: We caught eye contact and I was mesmerized by that smile.
ourStory.narrative: We met unexpectedly and discovered we had everything in common. After years of adventures together, we're ready to make it official.

travel.title: Travel & Porto
travel.gettingThereText: Vila Nova de Gaia is just across the Douro River from Porto, Portugal. The nearest airport is Francisco Sa Carneiro Airport (OPO), about 20 minutes by car.
travel.whereToStayText: We'll share accommodation suggestions closer to the date.
travel.thingsToDoText: Porto and Vila Nova de Gaia offer world-famous port wine cellars, stunning riverfront views, and vibrant historic neighborhoods to explore before and after the wedding.

kids.a: Yes! Children of all ages are welcome to join the celebration.

plusOnes.q: Can I bring a plus one?
plusOnes.a: Of course! Please include them in your RSVP.

language.q: What language will the ceremony be in?
language.a: The ceremony will be bilingual, in both English and Ukrainian.

weather.q: What will the weather be like?
weather.a: September in Porto is warm and sunny, typically around 20-25°C. Evenings can be cooler, so a light layer is recommended.

rsvp.title: RSVP
rsvp.intro: We look forward to seeing you! Fill out the form below.
rsvp.name: Full Name

rsvp.successMessage: Your RSVP has been received. We can't wait to celebrate with you!
rsvp.errorMessage: Please try again or email us directly.
